name: CoachingSessions
description: Coaching session records for a Client. CLIENT-READABLE: carries scalar ownerEmail (= parent Client.ownerEmail) set on create → SAME manual role-aware RowPolicy as Clients. sessionNotes is INTERNAL/staff-only and MUST be in the manual ColumnPolicy deny list (hidden from non-staff) and excluded from any client-facing safe view (P3.2). actionItems is client-visible. Policies configured manually, NOT in this artifact.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: nextSessionDate

columns.name: sessionNotes
columns.description: INTERNAL/staff-only coaching notes. Hidden from clients via manual ColumnPolicy + excluded from client-facing views.

columns.name: ownerEmail
columns.description: Scalar row-scope owner (= parent Client.ownerEmail), set on create. Drives the manual RowPolicy for client isolation.

columns.name: siteManager
columns.description: Site manager / coach who led the session
